# Modern Construction Business Website

This is a modern, clean website template for a construction company. It includes Home, About, Services, and Contact pages. All content and branding are fresh and ready for customization.

## Pages
- Home
- About
- Services
- Contact

## How to Use
Open `index.html` in your browser to view the site. All styles are in `style.css`. You can customize text, images, and colors as needed.
